name: kiro-projects-viewer
description: kiro-projects のプロジェクト状態（charter / backlog / needs / kiro-flow / GitLab）を可視化するダッシュボードビュアー
author: sandbox

scripts.test: node test/overview-ui.test.js && node test/detail-tabs-ui.test.js && node test/flow-relationship.test.js && node test/authoring.test.js && node test/charter-promote.test.js && node test/master-charter.test.js && node test/form-edit.test.js && node test/flow-archive.test.js && node test/agent-assist.test.js && node test/review-handoff.test.js && node test/flow-bus-per-project.test.js && node test/task-status-offloaded.test.js && node test/flow-reconcile.test.js && node test/flow-park-cancel.test.js && node test/replan.test.js && node test/reset.test.js && node test/workspace-root.test.js && node test/lifecycle.test.js && node test/hitl-review.test.js && node test/discover-scan.test.js && node test/flow-gitlab-issue.test.js && node test/liveness-host.test.js && node test/needs-diagnosis.test.js && node test/git-worktree-isolation.test.js && node test/flow-resubmit-task.test.js && node test/state-worktree.test.js && node test/git-heal.test.js && node test/flow-advice.test.js && node test/prose-render.test.js
